basic_details.job_title: Naini Aerospace Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 28 Operator SS and Junior Assistant Posts

salary_details.operator ss (electronics mechanic): Approx. Rs. 4.56 Lakh per annum (including EPF Contribution by Employer)
salary_details.operator ss (fitter): Approx. Rs. 4.56 Lakh per annum (including EPF Contribution by Employer)
salary_details.operator ss (electrician): Approx. Rs. 4.56 Lakh per annum (including EPF Contribution by Employer)
salary_details.junior asst. (imm): Approx. Rs. 4.96 Lakh per annum (including EPF Contribution by Employer)
salary_details.junior asst. (hr): Approx. Rs. 4.96 Lakh per annum (including EPF Contribution by Employer)
salary_details.junior asst. (finance): Approx. Rs. 4.96 Lakh per annum (including EPF Contribution by Employer)
salary_details.junior asst. (it): Approx. Rs. 4.96 Lakh per annum (including EPF Contribution by Employer)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Naini Aerospace Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://nael.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Naini Aerospace recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Naini Aerospace recruitment is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Operator SS / Junior Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 28 vacancies announced by Naini Aerospace for the Operator SS and Junior Assistant positions. These are distributed across various specializations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this Naini Aerospace recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for Operator SS posts is approximately Rs. 4.56 Lakh per annum, while for Junior Assistant posts, it is approximately Rs. 4.96 Lakh per annum, inclusive of EPF contributions by the employer.

faq.question: Q5. Where is Naini Aerospace located?
faq.answer: Naini Aerospace is located in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 211010.

faq.question: Q6. What is the official website of Naini Aerospace?
faq.answer: The official website of Naini Aerospace is https://nael.co.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual positions at Naini Aerospace.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Naini Aerospace recruitment is NAeL/Rectt./26/02.

faq.question: Q10. What are the different specializations for Operator SS posts?
faq.answer: The Operator SS posts are available in Electronics Mechanic, Fitter, and Electrician specializations.
